Bey Herrn Euler dem Buchbinder am Rheinsprung ist zu erfragen, wo folgende B√ºacher iraisonablem Prei√ü zu haben seyen : <BIBL><TITLE>Janii & Tremellii Biblia cum Annotationibus</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><TITLE>Acta Eruditorum Lipsiensia</TITLE> de An. <YEAR>1738</YEAR>. & <YEAR>1739</YEAR>.</BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Mohemii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>institutiones histor. Graec.</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE></BIBL>; und <BIBL><AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>, samtl. in <FORMAT>8v√≤</FORMAT>.</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":7,"explanation":"1. Added missing closing tag `</BIBL>` after `<FORMAT>4t√≤</FORMAT>.` — the `<BIBL>` for Mohemii's entry was never closed before the next `<BIBL>` started, creating improper nesting.\n2-6. Replaced bare `&` characters with `&` in five places: (a) \"Janii & Tremellii\", (b) \"1738. & 1739.\", (c) \"Tristiam & Epistolae\", (d) \"Graece & Latine cum notis Bocceri\", (e) \"Graece & Latine cum notis Schefferi\", (f) \"Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec.\" — bare ampersands are invalid in XML and must be escaped as `&`.\n7. Total of 6 `&` → `&` replacements plus 1 missing `</BIBL>` tag = 7 corrections. The missing `</BIBL>` was the structural error causing the Mohemii bibliographic entry to improperly contain all subsequent `<BIBL>` elements as children."}

Graec.</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE></BIBL>; und <BIBL><AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>, samtl. in <FORMAT>8v√≤</FORMAT>.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Added missing closing tag `</BIBL>` after `<FORMAT>4t√≤</FORMAT>.` — the `<BIBL>` for Mohemii's entry was never closed before the next `<BIBL>` started, creating improper nesting.
2-6. Replaced bare `&` characters with `&` in five places: (a) "Janii & Tremellii", (b) "1738. & 1739.", (c) "Tristiam & Epistolae", (d) "Graece & Latine cum notis Bocceri", (e) "Graece & Latine cum notis Schefferi", (f) "Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec." — bare ampersands are invalid in XML and must be escaped as `&`.
7. Total of 6 `&` → `&` replacements plus 1 missing `</BIBL>` tag = 7 corrections. The missing `</BIBL>` was the structural error causing the Mohemii bibliographic entry to improperly contain all subsequent `<BIBL>` elements as children.
